center.name: 羅伯特·里奇韋
center.summary: 羅伯特·里奇韋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括小加拿大雁、乌镰翅鸡、Blue-crowned parakeet等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | image_alt = A bird, around half the size of the hand holding it, with a pale neck and chest, and gold-silver bands of feathers across its dark back, | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Dichrozona | parent_authority = Ridgway, 1888 | species = cincta | authority = (Pelzeln, 1868) | synonyms = |synonyms_ref = |range_map = Dichrozona cincta map.svg }} The banded antbird (Dichrozona cincta) – sometimes called banded antwren despite not being close to the true antwrens – is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-crowned parakeet, blue-crowned conure, or sharp-tailed conure (Thectocercus acuticaudatus) is a small green Neotropical parrot with a blue head and pale beak native to large parts of South America, from eastern Colombia to Curacao in the southern Caribbean, and to the northern region of Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pearly antshrike (Megastictus margaritatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: taczanowskiis – Ridgway, 1901: found in Pacific South America from Ecuador to western Peru, has white fringes to the tertials The calls of this species include a chick and a weechaw

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sooty grouse (Dendragapus fuliginosus) is a species of forest-dwelling grouse native to North America's Pacific Coast Ranges.del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A., & Sargatal, J., eds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Genovesa ground finch (Geospiza acutirostris) is a small bird native to the Galápagos Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minimaSmall cackling goose (Ridgway, 1885) }} The cackling goose (Branta hutchinsii) is a species of goose found in North America and East Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale-eyed pygmy tyrant (Atalotriccus pilaris) is a species of bird in the tyrant flycatcher family Tyrannidae. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Panama, and Venezuela.Clements, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-naped xenopsaris (; Xenopsaris albinucha), also known as the reed becard and white-naped becard, is a species of suboscine bird in the family Tityridae, the only member of the genus Xenopsaris
